title: Printable signage-sheet adapter (ties to multilingual-signage-templates)
context: Clinics, shelters, schools, and transit agencies in low-resource settings need printable signage sheets they can produce locally without a design team. The signage-sheet adapter bridges open-pictograms (the symbol source) and the multilingual-signage-templates sibling project (the print layout system). The adapter must live in adapters/signage/ per the Elyos architecture and must generate print-ready layouts with symbols, multilingual labels, and correct CC-BY-4.0 attribution.
objective: Implement the printable signage-sheet adapter (adapters/signage/) that generates print-ready signage layouts from open-pictograms symbols and labels, compatible with the multilingual-signage-templates sibling project.
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter generates print-ready signage sheets (PDF or SVG layout) from a configurable set of symbols and their multilingual labels; output is suitable for local printing without a design tool.
Adapter integrates with the multilingual-signage-templates sibling project's layout format; the integration point is documented (input format, output format, how to use both projects together).
Each sheet includes CC-BY-4.0 attribution for the symbols (attribution string from metadata records) and supports configurable language selection from available vetted label sets.
Adapter lives in adapters/signage/ (per Elyos architecture); contains no vendor-specific or layout-tool-specific logic outside the adapter directory.
Adapter is TypeScript/ESM, pnpm-based, passes pnpm build && pnpm lint, is licensed MIT, and is integrated into the CI build pipeline.
resources: Creative Commons CC-BY-4.0 (symbol assets); MIT License (adapter code)
output: adapters/signage/ TypeScript/ESM signage-sheet adapter; licensed MIT. PR opened against main with passing CI build and lint.
